# Lead Capture and Delivery

> **Version:** 1.0.0
> **Status:** planned
> **Provenance:** 3P
> **Derives From:** `ddd`
> **Catalog Sources:** `analytics/domain/event-management.yaml` (lead-capture-roi)

Badge scanning and lead delivery — a SUPPORTING service offered to exhibitors. Proves exhibitor ROI via post-show lead data. Vendor-provided hardware/software. The lead-to-conversion rate (>5% benchmark from B2B event industry) feeds back into rebooking decisions.

---

## Overview

Lead capture is the bridge between the Interaction and Exhibitor contexts. During the live event, badge scanning creates LeadRecords. Post-show, lead reports are packaged and delivered to exhibitors. The quality and volume of leads is part of the exhibitor's ROI calculus — which directly influences rebooking.

At AXPONA's scale, this is a buy-adapt capability. The badge scanning vendor provides the hardware and basic software. The value-add is packaging lead data in a way that supports exhibitor ROI storytelling.

## Capabilities

- badge-scan-capture
- lead-data-aggregation
- lead-report-delivery
- lead-to-conversion-rate-tracking

## Key Metrics

| Metric | Formula | Target |
|--------|---------|--------|
| Leads per exhibitor | leads / exhibitors_with_license | > 50 |
| Lead retrieval adoption | with_license / total_exhibitors | >= 30% |
| Lead-to-conversion | converted / captured | > 5% |

## Related Patterns

- `exhibitor-lifecycle-management` — lead data feeds exhibitor ROI and rebooking
- `lead-effectiveness-analytics` — measures this pattern
